mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.id AS product_id, p.product_code, p.product_model FROM pq_answer a INNER JOIN pq_product p ON p.id = a.product_id ORDER BY p.product_model ASC, p.id ASC
SELECT DISTINCT a.app_version FROM pq_answer a WHERE a.app_version IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(a.app_version) != '' ORDER BY a.app_version ASC
SELECT DISTINCT a.rom_version FROM pq_answer a WHERE a.rom_version IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(a.rom_version) != '' ORDER BY a.rom_version ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS questionnaire_count, SUM(CASE WHEN a.recommend_score BETWEEN 9 AND 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS promoter_count, SUM(CASE WHEN a.recommend_score BETWEEN 7 AND 8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passive_count, SUM(CASE WHEN a.recommend_score BETWEEN 1 AND 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS detractor_count, AVG(a.recommend_score) AS average_recommend_score FROM pq_answer a INNER JOIN pq_product p ON p.id = a.product_id WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT ${bucketExpression} AS period_start_date, COUNT(*) AS questionnaire_count, SUM(CASE WHEN a.recommend_score BETWEEN 9 AND 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS promoter_count, SUM(CASE WHEN a.recommend_score BETWEEN 7 AND 8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passive_count, SUM(CASE WHEN a.recommend_score BETWEEN 1 AND 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS detractor_count FROM pq_answer a INNER JOIN pq_product p ON p.id = a.product_id WHERE 1 = 1
GROUP BY ${bucketExpression} ORDER BY period_start_date ASC

SELECT f.id AS feature_id, f.feature_code, f.feature_name, f.created_at, SUM(CASE WHEN score_rows.score BETWEEN 1 AND 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS score_count, SUM(CASE WHEN score_rows.score BETWEEN 9 AND 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS promoter_count, SUM(CASE WHEN score_rows.score BETWEEN 7 AND 8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passive_count, SUM(CASE WHEN score_rows.score BETWEEN 1 AND 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS detractor_count FROM pq_feature f LEFT JOIN ( SELECT fs.feature_id, fs.score FROM pq_answer_feature_score fs INNER JOIN pq_answer a ON a.id = fs.answer_id INNER JOIN pq_product p ON p.id = a.product_id WHERE 1 = 1
) score_rows ON score_rows.feature_id = f.id WHERE f.status = 1 GROUP BY f.id, f.feature_code, f.feature_name, f.created_at, f.sort_no ORDER BY f.sort_no ASC, f.id ASC

SELECT ${bucketExpression} AS period_start_date, SUM(CASE WHEN fs.score BETWEEN 1 AND 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS questionnaire_count, SUM(CASE WHEN fs.score BETWEEN 9 AND 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS promoter_count, SUM(CASE WHEN fs.score BETWEEN 7 AND 8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passive_count, SUM(CASE WHEN fs.score BETWEEN 1 AND 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS detractor_count FROM pq_answer_feature_score fs INNER JOIN pq_answer a ON a.id = fs.answer_id INNER JOIN pq_product p ON p.id = a.product_id WHERE fs.feature_id = #{featureId}
GROUP BY ${bucketExpression} ORDER BY period_start_date ASC
